untranslatable_reason: Signal requires staged multi-leg exits (40% at new extreme, 60% on 0.3 ATR pullback) which cannot be expressed in single condition format. The backtest engine schema does not support fractional position liquidation rules, multi-target exit sequencing, or ATR-relative pullback thresholds as discrete conditions. Recommend implementing as custom exit handler or position management module.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Entry uses 20-bar Donchian for new highs/lows detection; position gain requirement converted to returns > 0. Exit uses price_pos_20 (position within 20-bar range) as proxy for pullback trigger. However, the core signal—staged exits with percentage-based liquidation at specific price levels—requires custom position management logic outside standard indicator-based rule framework.
